standards.statement: A credit-metered upstream query is cached and never re-executed on a trigger; spend is tallied against a budget.
standards.rationale: Dune's 2500 credit/mo budget is respected via getLatestResults + 6h cache.

standards.statement: Never read the chain in a single unbounded getLogs; page it in cap-sized checkpointed chunks into a local store so the analytics window survives provider range and archive limits.
Store timestamps as unix seconds and lowercase all addresses at the boundary.
standards.rationale: A normalization convention the schema and providers all assume.

standards.statement: An upstream 429 throws a typed rate-limit error and never collapses into empty data, null, or a faked value.
standards.rationale: Prevents silent data loss masquerading as a real empty result.

standards.statement: On error, preserve the resumable cursor and never fabricate rows; the next run resumes cleanly.
standards.rationale: The pipeline's resumability depends on never writing partial or fake rows.

standards.statement: ChainSonar never holds keys, signs, or places real orders; it reads the chain and simulates on paper only.
standards.rationale: The product's core safety invariant, kept everywhere in the codebase.

standards.statement: When a component or lib file passes about 200 LOC, split it into siblings named after the original: a dash-shared.ts for pure types, constants, and formatters (no JSX, no DB calls); a dash-name file per cohesive extracted unit such as a data table or a discovery/pricing phase; keep the original filename as the container or entry point so external imports do not change.
standards.rationale: insider-backtest.tsx was already split this way before this refactor, into insider-backtest-shared.ts, insider-backtest-scoreboard.tsx, insider-backtest-trades.tsx. Reapplying the identical shape to pipeline.tsx, insider-watch.tsx, and lib/backtest.ts confirms it generalizes to both UI components and lib data modules, keeps every file under 200 LOC, and needs zero changes at call sites.
standards.detail_md: app/components/pipeline.tsx + pipeline-shared.ts + pipeline-tables.tsx; app/components/insider-watch.tsx + insider-watch-shared.ts + insider-watch-table.tsx; lib/backtest.ts + lib/backtest-types.ts + lib/backtest-score.ts + lib/backtest-engine.ts

standards.statement: A check the code cannot verify is shown as unknown or pending, never green and never a fabricated number.
standards.rationale: Honesty by design; enforced across pipeline, token-inspect, and insider-watch.

standards.statement: Any table or list that can exceed roughly 40 rows windows the DOM to the visible slice plus overscan from rows already in memory, keeping a sized spacer so the scrollbar stays honest; it triggers no extra upstream fetch, and lists below the threshold render in full so small cases are unchanged.
